decision_notes: Map compliance fee to Admin Fee at origin.
Create new Import Air Transfer Fee ProductCode.
Map EDI Fee to Import Documentation Fee (Origin).
Map Terminal Handling Charge to Cargo Terminal Operator Fee (Origin).
Create new Import Airport Security Fee (Origin) ProductCode.
Map specific airfreight leg charge to Import Air Freight.
Map pick up metro area to Pick-Up Fee (Origin).
Map PX AWB Fee to Origin AWB Fee.
Map Security Fee to X-Ray Screen Fee (Origin).
Map Terminal Handling Fee to Cargo Terminal Operator Fee (Origin).
Map X-ray* to X-Ray Screen Fee (Origin).
Map Cargo Terminal Operator Fee (Origin) to existing matching CTO ProductCode.
Map Import Air Freight directly to catalog item.
Map Import Documentation Fee (Origin) directly to catalog item.
Map Pick-Up Fee (Origin) directly to catalog item.
Map Import Origin Permit / License directly to catalog item.
CMD fee is highly corridor-specific and ambiguous; deferred for manual operator quote review.
DNATA processing fee is specific to the terminal operator and needs manual checking.
Map FSC in origin charges context to Pick-Up Fuel Surcharge.
Labour charges require manual assessment as they are calculated ad-hoc based on time/manpower.
Map Permit Fee to Import Origin Permit / License.
General Service Fee lacks clear operational breakdown; must be manually reviewed per carrier invoice.
X-Ray Scanning Fee is too ambiguous to map without manual verification of security level.
